Lyrics:
Si l’eau ne prend que la couleur
Que la lumière lui donne
Quand la vie m’habille de noir
Et bien, moi je lui pardonne

Qu’on soit d’ici ou d’ailleurs
Nous ne sommes que des Hommes
Forgés par nos erreurs
Que seul l’amour console

Bonjour pardon et mille mercis alors
Pour toutes les fois où elle m’a couverte d’or

Bonjour
Pardon
Merci
Il manque un vers à ce poème
Un mot qui nous unit
Bonjour
Pardon
Merci
Je t’aime

Combien de temps va-t-elle rester
Cette marque de rouge à lèvres
Il y a ces moments donnés
Que le temps nous enlève

On n’en aura jamais assez
On en manquera toujours
On n’a jamais trop donné
Ni trop reçu d’amour

Bonjour pardon et oui je t’aime encore
De tous les sentiments
Ce dernier est le plus fort

Bonjour
Pardon
Merci
Il manque un vers à ce poème
Un mot qui nous unit
Bonjour
Pardon
Merci
Je t’aime

Regarde, il nous sourit
L’univers entier nous appelle
Du fond des galaxies

Pardon
Merci
Je t’aime

Tu te pares de rose tu te fardes
Tu brilles de mille paillettes
Comme un soldat monte la garde
Face aux démons dans sa tête
Et si parfois toi aussi tu as peur
De ne pas assez briller de l’intérieur

Merci
Il manque un vers à ce poème
Un mot qui nous unit

Bonjour

snippet.description:

A desert crossing spanning roughly 750 miles—the land that Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli must make their way through, is home to the dreaded area known as the “Devil’s Palm.”
As ominous incidents begin to unfold, they are forced to realize that this race is far more than a mere competition.
The two press forward into the 2nd STAGE, where countless hidden motives collide.

snippet.title: The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All | Official Teaser | Crunchyroll
snippet.description:
The Guy She Was Interested In Wasn't a Guy At All is coming to Crunchyroll in 2027!

ABOUT THE GUY SHE WAS INTERESTED IN WASN'T A GUY AT ALL
Fashionable and upbeat high schooler Aya loves listening to rock, but no one else seems to share her interest…until she meets a cool, stylish employee at a CD shop. Dressed in black from head to toe, he has this air of mystery about him, and his taste in music is impeccable. Aya falls hard for him—not knowing her crush is actually her female classmate Mitsuki! For her part, Mitsuki generally keeps to herself and avoids standing out at school. But given that she sits right next to Aya, Mitsuki’s all too aware of the other girl’s feelings, and she’s afraid to reveal the truth. So why does she find herself talking with Aya more and more…?

ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL

snippet.title: ARK Tides of Fortune & Dragontopia Trailer
snippet.description:
Set sail, take flight, and step into two massive new ARK adventures: ARK Tides of Fortune and ARK: Dragontopia, each bringing a distinct new frontier of survival, exploration, creatures, combat, and progression to the ARK universe.

ARK Tides of Fortune

Pull up a chair, Survivors. Everyone knows the legendary ARK veteran Bob - played by Karl Urban - but you haven't truly heard a tale until you've survived his swashbuckling exploits on the high seas. Hoist the sails and experience his next chapter of incredibly true adventures in ARK Tides of Fortune!

The simulated ocean of Genesis Ascended Part 1 has opened into a massive, map-wide nautical frontier. Chart a course across a vast sea, hunt for buried treasure, and clash with treacherous enemies in explosive naval combat. The new weapons, structures, cosmetics, and exotic creatures included in Tides of Fortune can be unleashed across the ARK universe, but the deep physics-driven waters of Genesis are where this swashbuckling arsenal truly comes alive. 

ARK Tides of Fortune - Steam
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4558480/ARK_Tides_of_Fortune/

ARK Tides of Fortune - Xbox
https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/ark-tides-of-fortune/9NW717HPJDK9

ARK Tides of Fortune - PlayStation
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0691-PPSA16810_00-TIDESOFFORTUNE01


ARK: Dragontopia

Tame the legends and rule the skies!

Awaken within a cloudbound paradise where the earth has fractured into a world of floating islands, and myths take flight. High above these magical grounds, Survivors must learn a new rhythm of survival alongside the true rulers of the sky: dragons. Across a vast aerial ecosystem, ARK: Dragontopia invites you to step off the edge and master the skies. Guided by the echoes of a lost order of dragonriders, you’ll enter a land where legends breathe anew. As a fierce new threat claims the horizon, it is up to you to restore balance!

LORDS OF THE SKY
Between the sun and moon, the skies teem with draconic legends. Encounter titanic behemoths that devour resources and enemies alike, elegant wind-dancing steeds that gallop across the clouds, deadly four-winged assassins, multi-headed beasts of dual-breathed chaos, and loyal shoulder-drakes that guard you on your journey. Every dragon demands its own path to taming, requiring you to observe, learn, and master their unique rhythms before they ever let you take the saddle.

THE DRAGONTOPIA ECOSYSTEM
To survive this high-altitude frontier, you’ll need to grow through the Dragon Skill Trees, a new progression system built around strengthening your bond with these mythical beasts. Craft specialized gear, wield potent tools, and expand your base with a draconic tileset, incubator backpacks, and mysterious potion stations. But these skies are contested, and you are the realm’s last hope to break the vanguard of a ruthless airborne invader!
The dragons are waking, the islands are calling, and the Skies of Dragontopia are yours to claim!

Dragonntopia - Steam
https://store.steampowered.com/app/4558490/ARK_Dragontopia/

Dragonntopia - Xbox
https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/ark-dragontopia/9NB7PMZ290KX/0010

Dragonntopia - PlayStation
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0691-PPSA16810_00-DRAGONTOPIADLC01

snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official Countdown Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theatres 7 17 26

Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in theatres everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

"Ride" de Twenty One Pilots es un viaje introspectivo oculto tras un ritmo alegre. La canción explora la lucha contra la ansiedad y el exceso de pensamiento (overthinking), planteando el dilema existencial de que morir por alguien es fácil, pero el verdadero reto es tener el valor de vivir por ellos. Es una invitación a tomarse el tiempo necesario para procesar el caos de la vida mientras disfrutamos del trayecto. ✨

snippet.title: 『劇場版 薬屋のひとりごと 亡妃の秘宝』予告｜2026年12月11日（金）公開
snippet.description:
水上都市に隠された秘宝を巡り、新たなミステリーの幕が上がる！
『劇場版 薬屋のひとりごと 亡妃の秘宝』2026/12/11(金) 公開決定✨

シリーズ初となる劇場版は、原作者・日向夏による完全新作ストーリー！

【ストーリー】
帝から壬氏にとある命が下された。
それは、5 年前に後宮で命を落とした妃の“故郷へ帰りたい”という最期の願いを叶えること。
遺体の謎を解き明かすため、猫猫は壬氏に連れられ、南の地へと旅に出る。
辿り着いたのは、活気あふれる水上都市。
そこに隠された秘宝を巡り、新たなミステリーの幕が上がる！！

【スタッフ】

水上都市に隠された秘宝を巡り、新たなミステリーの幕が上がる！
『劇場版 薬屋のひとりごと 亡妃の秘宝』2026/12/11(金) 公開決定✨

シリーズ初となる劇場版は、原作者・日向夏による完全新作ストーリー！

【ストーリー】
帝から壬氏にとある命が下された。
それは、5 年前に後宮で命を落とした妃の“故郷へ帰りたい”という最期の願いを叶えること。
遺体の謎を解き明かすため、猫猫は壬氏に連れられ、南の地へと旅に出る。
辿り着いたのは、活気あふれる水上都市。
そこに隠された秘宝を巡り、新たなミステリーの幕が上がる！！

snippet.title: The Dukes of Hazzard Reboot (2026) | Ryan Gosling, Charlize Theron, Nicole Kidman | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#dukesofhazzard #ryangosling #concepttrailer

Watch This Dukes of Hazzard Reboot Concept Trailer

What if the Duke family was torn apart by time and distance and the only thing that could bring them back together was the death of the man who raised them and a county that needed saving one last time? This fan-made concept trailer imagines a 2026 Dukes of Hazzard reboot where Jake Gyllenhaal plays Bo Duke, a reckless dirt-track racing driver running from his roots, and Ryan Gosling plays Luke Duke, a battle-hardened ex-soldier carrying the weight of two tours overseas, both called home to Hazzard County by Charlize Theron as Daisy Duke, the fierce and tireless woman who stayed behind alone to hold the family farm together after Uncle Jesse's passing.

I personally created every storyboard and visual in this "What If" concept from scratch, building a gritty modern reimagining where Leonardo DiCaprio plays Jefferson Hogg, the polished and ruthless grandson of the infamous Boss Hogg who is systematically seizing family farms across the county through corrupt tax liens and forged paperwork, backed by Nicole Kidman as Sheriff Lorena Dawson, a calculating lawwoman who traded her oath for Hogg's money, and Matt Damon as Marcus Kaine, a brutal ex-military enforcer commanding a private army in blacked-out vehicles.

When the Dukes discover that Hogg's land grab is hiding an illegal industrial dumping operation poisoning the county's soil, three estranged family members reunite under one roof and rebuild the legendary General Lee from the barn where Jesse left it for a dangerous mission to photograph the evidence and deliver it to the courthouse before Hogg's demolition crews erase the Duke farm from the map.

Every visual in this HD concept trailer was designed and built by me to honor the heart, rebellion, and high-speed spirit of the original Dukes of Hazzard while transforming the story into a grounded Southern thriller where Bo drives, Luke runs tactical, and Daisy carries the truth in her hands as three Dukes take on an enemy with more money, more guns, and the law on his side armed with nothing but a fast car, family loyalty, and the stubborn refusal to let Hazzard County die without a fight.

Disclaimer: This is entirely a fan-made concept trailer created for entertainment and creative purposes only. All storyboard work and visuals were originally created by me. This video is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Warner Bros., or any official Dukes of Hazzard production or its rights holders.

Along with fan-made trailers, I also share movie reviews, news, and updates from the world of entertainment. Be sure to hit that subscribe button and stay updated on all the latest from my channel!

くだらない / 譲れない から
笑えない 笑えない
いつの間に こんなに

変わりたい / 変われない 二人
分からない / 解らない まま
すれ違い もつれ合う
二つの恒星
背負った運命

I don't know 'bout everything
If you carry guilt or sin
Resolutions aren't in me
But I can see
Ties that bind us won't astray
Knowin' deep inside your veins
Tell me how'd it break away?

こんな馬鹿らしい未来
救いはないの？
残酷な黙示録
ねえ どうして
こんな結末を
望んでなんかいないよ
知ってる
私 気付いてた
夜空に寄り添い並ぶ
あの星のように
きっときっと
本当は二人
ずっとずっと
想い合っていたのに

どれだけ時が過ぎても
たとえ どれだけ離れていても
君と生きたあの日々は今でも
遥か先の星のようにキラキラ

私 もう涙見せないから
私 誰より強くなるから
いつか 晴れた空の下で ほら
また一緒に笑い合いたいから

ねえ君は覚えている？
幼い頃の泣き虫だった
私のこと ぎゅっと
抱きしめてくれたこと

ねえ君は覚えている？
いつか離れ離れになったって
必ず帰ってくるって
言ってくれたこと

I don't know 'bout everything
If you carry guilt or sin
Resolutions aren't in me
But I can see
Ties that bind us won't astray
Knowin' deep inside your veins
Tell me how'd it break away?
Still, I could say...

We don't know 'bout everything
We differ in how we think
Somethin' that'll always be
Remember these
Ties that bind us won't astray
Isolation, no, we gleam 
Constellation, like a dream
...with you and me

一人 背負い続けてきたんだよね
どんな時も
ねえ 忘れないで
どこに居ても
君のことを想う人がいること
明日が見えないほどの闇夜に
迷い込んでしまっても
ほらね 必ず
見つけ出すから

一人じゃないよ
強く結んだ一直線
飛び出した包囲網
そう 何度離れても
また此処で会えると
信じていたよ
この街を覆ったあの雲を
一緒に穿つんだ
ねえ いつの日か
きっときっと
寄り添い並ぶ
あの星のように

どれだけ時が過ぎても
たとえ どれだけ離れていても
君は 一人きりじゃないんだよ
かざす指先でほら なぞれば

私 もう涙見せないから
私 誰より強くなるから
いつかこの空が晴れた日には
また一緒に笑い合える
そう信じてる
--

snippet.title: 【特報】『劇場版 俺だけレベルアップな件 -Beyond the System-』制作決定
snippet.description:
TVアニメ『俺だけレベルアップな件Season 2 -Arise from the Shadow-』待望の続編、
『劇場版 俺だけレベルアップな件 -Beyond the System-』制作決定！
続報をお楽しみに。

======================
≪『劇場版 俺だけレベルアップな件 -Beyond the System-』特報映像≫
＜CAST＞ 
水篠 旬：坂 泰斗 
  
＜STAFF＞
Director / Director of Photography / Editor / Colorist：Tao Tajima 
 
[Animation Production]  
Character Design & Key Animator：Tomoko Sudo 

Second Key Animator：Orie Tanaka / Daiki Matsuura 
　　　　　　　　　　  Wakana Yamauchi（A-1 Pictures）
　　　　　　　　　　  Yuto Ikeda Shoi Kato（A-1 Pictures Fukuoka studio）
 
Animation Inspector：Mio Suzuki 
 
Animator：Aika Ishida / Rei Inage / Hina Tanaka / Manami Nakashima / Kana Asai
（A-1 Pictures Fukuoka studio） 
  
Color Design/Color Setting/Color Inspection：Naomi Nakano（stella）
  
Coloring：Rie Arai（stella）
  
Motion Graphics：Hiromu Oshiro (Production I.G) 
  
Animation Produced & CG Modeling Provided by A-1 Pictures 
  
Production Assistant：Kanto Kikuchi 
  
Animation Producer：Atsushi Kaneko 
  
[Live-Action Production]  
CG Supervisor：Tomotaka Yokoo 
CG Character Look Development Artist：Ryuichi Tokushige 
CG Character Animator：Yu Shimizu 
Digital Artist：Nicolas Leon Flores 
VFX Compositor：Sho Yamaguchi / Ydot 

▮Korea Unit  
Producer：BAEK INHO 
Location Coordinator：KANG CHANGSOO 
Drone：SHIN JAEHYUCK 

▮Japan Unit  
Drone：Hiroki Funatsu
Drone Assistant：Saki Kimura 
Production Manager：Asuka Ikeda 

Producer：Kenji Tomita / Yoshihiro Takahata
Production：Hacsika 


Project Planning：Sota Furuhashi

======================
■イントロダクション 
世界的な人気を博している、原作・原案 Chugong、作画 DUBU(REDICE STUDIO)、脚色 h-goon(D＆C MEDIA 発行)による韓国の小説、漫画作品。
日本でも電子マンガ・ノベルサービス「ピッコマ」にて累計PV数12.2億回を突破している本作が、ついに全世界待望のアニメ化。
舞台は異次元と現世界を結ぶ通路”ゲート”、そして”ハンター”と呼ばれる特殊能力を持つ人間達が存在する世界。人類最弱兵器と呼ばれる最低ランクのハンター、「水篠 旬」は
ある日突然自分だけが「レベルアップ」する力を手に入れる。数多の試練を乗り越え、旬は”最弱”から”最強”へ駆けあがる。 

■スタッフ 
原作：DUBU(REDICE STUDIO)、Chugong、h-goon(D＆C MEDIA 発行) 
音楽：澤野弘之
アニメーション制作：A-1 Pictures 

■キャスト 
水篠 旬：坂 泰斗

■公式サイト：https://sololeveling-anime.net/
■公式X：https://x.com/sololeveling_pr
■公式TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@sololeveling_pr
■推奨ハッシュタグ：#俺だけレベルアップな件 #俺レベ #SoloLeveling

■原作はこちらをチェック
https://piccoma.com/web/product/5523
